title: lespedeza hirta
intro: Lespedeza hirta, also known as hairy bush clover, is a perennial legume native to Asia and introduced to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lespedeza hirta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and support the cardiovascular system. Lespedeza hirta can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal blends to promote overall well-being and immunity.
